canonical_question: What are SAP IDocs - message types, basic types, segments, and EDI integration capabilities?
aliases: How do SAP IDocs work for EDI integration?
What is the difference between IDoc message types and basic types?
How to configure SAP IDoc partner profiles and ports for EDI?
What are common SAP IDoc types like ORDERS05, INVOIC02, MATMAS?

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: S/4HANA 2020 — new segments in INVOIC02 and MATMAS IDocs

constraints: S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition does NOT support IDoc/ALE — use OData or SOAP APIs instead
IDoc processing is always asynchronous — no synchronous request/response pattern available
Maximum IDoc size is limited by dialog work process timeout (default 600s) and memory (default 2GB roll area)
Partner profiles must be configured per message type AND per partner — no wildcard routing
Custom IDoc extensions must use Z-prefix naming convention for segments and types
Outbound IDocs require explicit output determination or ALE distribution model configuration

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs real-time synchronous API integration with SAP
User is on S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (multi-tenant)
User needs SAP-to-SAP data replication only

related_to.label: SAP S/4HANA OData API — synchronous alternative to IDocs

alternative_to.label: SAP S/4HANA Cloud API — for public cloud edition (no IDoc support)

often_confused_with.label: SAP BAPI/RFC — synchronous function calls vs asynchronous IDocs

inputs_needed.question: What integration pattern do you need?
